category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Vietnam market access, MOIT mandatory energy labelling, QCVN efficiency requirements, and TCVN/IEC 60034 standards.

title.en: China-to-Vietnam Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入越南：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入越南：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Vietnam QCVN 04:2009/BCT mandatory energy label (IE efficiency), TCVN/IEC 60034 standards, QUATEST conformity testing, and MOIT import declaration requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与越南 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 强制能效标签（IE等级）、TCVN/IEC 60034 标准、QUATEST 合规检测及工贸部进口申报要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與越南 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 強制能效標籤（IE等級）、TCVN/IEC 60034 標準、QUATEST 合規檢測及工貿部進口申報要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Vietnam MOIT, QCVN, STAMEQ, QUATEST, customs, and market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验越南工贸部、QCVN、STAMEQ、QUATEST、海关及市场监管的现行要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗越南工貿部、QCVN、STAMEQ、QUATEST、海關及市場監管的現行要求。

answer_first.en: Vietnam mandates IE2 minimum via QCVN 04:2009/BCT with MOIT energy label; QUATEST conformity testing and a declaration of conformity plus energy certificate are required for import. China GB 18613-2020 IE3 (Grade 3) exceeds the Vietnam IE2 floor, but a separate Vietnam energy label certificate and QUATEST test report are still required.
answer_first.zh: 越南通过 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 强制要求最低 IE2 及工贸部能效标签；进口须提供 QUATEST 合格评定报告和符合性声明及能效证书。中国 GB 18613-2020 IE3（3级）超过越南 IE2 门槛，但仍须另行取得越南能效标签证书和 QUATEST 测试报告。
answer_first.zht: 越南透過 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 強制要求最低 IE2 及工貿部能效標籤；進口須提供 QUATEST 合格評定報告和符合性聲明及能效證書。中國 GB 18613-2020 IE3（3級）超過越南 IE2 門檻，但仍須另行取得越南能效標籤證書和 QUATEST 測試報告。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
